text:
Medicare beneficiary needs no matter the payer; it is not obligated to provide medical 
supplies that are not needed. If a patient has medical supplies provided by the VA 
because of the patient's preference, then the HHA must not duplicate the supplies under 
Medicare. The beneficiary's choice is controlling. The HHA may not require the 
beneficiary to obtain or use medical supplies covered by the primary payer from any 
other source, including the VA.
